steps: Complete single cell or nuclei isolation and 10x fixation prior to starting this protocol
CG000315_Rev-E.pdf Sequence with the read format 29,10,10,89
BCL data from Illumina sequencer is demultiplexed and converted into FASTQ format using bcl2fastq version 2.20.0
